roadmap.summary: Evict LiveAllocation::Terminated in ExecDriver::stop and SimDriver to remove unbounded BTreeMap growth across job lifecycles. Drop the variant outright; relax Driver::status post-stop contract to Err(NotFound). Single-cut greenfield discipline.

steps.name: Regression test for bounded live-map cardinality
criteria: New worker integration test runs 8 start+stop cycles against distinct AllocationIds and asserts driver live-map cardinality is zero after stops complete.
Symmetric test added for SimDriver in the sim acceptance suite asserting the same cardinality invariant.
Both new tests FAIL against current code (Terminated slot retained), proving RED.
Cardinality accessor exposed via cfg(test) or pub(crate) — never on the public Driver trait surface.
New tests wire through the existing tests/integration entrypoint (worker) and tests/acceptance entrypoint (sim).
implementation_notes: Use the with_allow_no_cgroups(true) + TempDir fixture from existing exec_driver tests; do not invent a new fixture.
Cardinality accessor: prefer a #[cfg(test)] impl block on the same source file as the type; pub(crate) fn live_count(&self) -> usize { self.live.lock().len() }.
Stop is async — await each stop() in the loop; do not parallelize.
Mac dev loop: cargo nextest run --features integration-tests --no-run for compile-check; full runs via cargo xtask lima run -- cargo nextest run --features integration-tests per testing.md § Lima.
RED-phase commit may use --no-verify per testing.md § RED scaffolds; reference this step in the commit body.
Bug-fix scope: do NOT refactor unrelated test fixtures or extract helpers. Inline the loop.

steps.name: Drop Terminated variant; evict slot in stop
criteria: LiveAllocation::Terminated removed from ExecDriver; status/stop/resize matches collapse to two arms with None returning Err(NotFound).
Symmetric change applied to SimDriver so the two adapters stay aligned with the shared trait contract.
Driver::status rustdoc documents post-stop returns Err(NotFound); durable terminal state lives in ObservationStore AllocStatusRow.
Three pre-existing acceptance assertions at the cited lines rewritten to expect Err(DriverError::NotFound) instead of Ok(Terminated).
Both regression tests from step 01-01 PASS; full workspace tests pass; mutation kill rate is at least eighty percent on diff scope.
implementation_notes: Single-cut greenfield (memory: feedback_single_cut_greenfield_migrations.md, feedback_delete_dont_gate.md): delete the variant outright. NO #[deprecated], NO compat shim, NO commented-out arms.
Bug-fix scope (CLAUDE.md): no features, no unrelated refactors, no abstractions. Just the deletion + trait rustdoc + test rewrites.
If LiveAllocation collapses to a struct, pick whichever shape gives the smaller diff; mention the choice in the commit body.
Trait rustdoc location: read crates/overdrive-core/src/traits/driver.rs to find the existing fn status declaration; do not invent a line range.

Double-stop now returns Err(NotFound) instead of Ok(()). Verify production caller crates/overdrive-control-plane/src/action_shim.rs absorbs this with `let _ = driver.stop(...)`; if any other caller branches on Ok vs Err, surface as upstream-issues.md before proceeding.

Mutation gate: cargo xtask lima run -- cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --features integration-tests --package overdrive-worker --file crates/overdrive-worker/src/driver.rs (>=80%); same for overdrive-sim if its driver.rs is in the diff.
Conventional commit: `fix(worker): evict terminated slot in ExecDriver::stop` with body summarising the contract change and citing the trait rustdoc location.
